issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing filter conditions: must specify exactly 1 card with names [Sabo], [Portgas.D.Ace], or [Monkey.D.Luffy] AND cost ≤ 5. Current filter is 'Any' which doesn't match the selective reveal requirement.
SearchDeck does not account for the 'look at 5 cards' scoping mechanic. Action should clarify that search is limited to top 5 cards of deck.

Missing action for placing remaining cards at bottom of deck in any order. Current DSL only captures hand addition; must include secondary action or extended SearchDeck behavior to handle pile ordering.
